case_title: MIGUEL GARCIA ET AL VS. ALEXANDER KOLESNIKOV ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $150.00- SERVED FEB-29-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KOLESNIKOV, ALEXANDER DRV

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA, MIGUEL GARCIA, KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOLESNIKOV, ALEXANDER DRV KOLESNIKOV, DINA R.O. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $375.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,375.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-03-2016 - MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ALEXANDER KOLESNIKOV, DINA KOLESNIKOV IS GRANTED, AND CONTINUED TO JUL-22-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. APPEARANCE BY CO-DEFENDANT DINA KOLESNIKOV ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GARCIA, MIGUEL GARCIA, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT KOLESNIKOV, ALEXANDER DRV KOLESNIKOV, DINA R.O. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA, MIGUEL GARCIA, KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOLESNIKOV, ALEXANDER DRV KOLESNIKOV, DINA R.O. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $375.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,375.00, AT HIS REQUEST, PLAINTIFF, MIGUEL GARCIA, IS APPOINTED GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR HIS SON KEVIN GARCIA, A MINOR THIRTEEN YEARS OF AGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT KOLESNIKOV, DINA R.O.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-22-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-22-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFFS ONLY. AT HIS REQUEST, PLAINTIFF MIGUEL GARCIA IS APPOINTED GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR HIS SON KEVIN GARCIA, A MINOR THIRTEEN YEARS OF AGE. MIGUEL GARCIA WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER LAURA VILLANUEVA. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KOLESNIKOV, ALEXANDER DRV KOLESNIKOV, DINA R.O. HEARING SET FOR JUN-03-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-23-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-23-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT ALEXANDER KOLESNIKOV DRV WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. DEFENDANT DINO R. O. KOLESNIKOV WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MARGO SEELY. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 150.00 - SERVED FEB-29-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KOLESNIKOV, DINA R.O.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON ALEXANDER KOLESNIKOV DRV TO SEP-23-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MIGUEL GARCIA WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. PLAINTIFF KEVIN GARCIA WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DINA KOLESNIKOV R.O. WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER KOLESNIKOV DRV WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FORSBLAD. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
